requirements.text: All public functions MUST have corresponding test files
Edge cases (empty input, boundary values) MUST be tested explicitly
Error paths MUST be tested, not only happy paths
Deprecated APIs MUST NOT be used; use supported alternatives
Type annotations MUST be used on public function signatures
Health-check endpoints MUST be implemented for long-running services
Circuit breakers MUST be used for external service calls
Retry logic MUST use exponential backoff with jitter
Timeouts MUST be set on all external HTTP and database calls
Graceful shutdown handlers MUST be implemented for server processes
Exceptions MUST be caught and handled; empty catch blocks are forbidden
Null/undefined dereferences MUST be guarded before use
Async operations MUST handle rejection/error paths explicitly
Input from external sources MUST be validated before processing
Fallback values MUST be provided for optional configuration
Resource handles (files, connections) MUST be closed in finally blocks or using RAII patterns
Database transactions MUST be rolled back on error
Temporary files MUST be cleaned up in finally/defer blocks
Persistent operations MUST be idempotent or use transaction guards
Error messages MUST include enough context for diagnosis (operation, input, state)
